Quick Start Example

1. Add sls.tf to your project

Add the sls.tf submodule to your project and initialize it.

2. Create your Terraform configuration

Create a simple Terraform configuration file that references your serverless.yml.

3. Deploy with Terraform

Run the standard Terraform commands to deploy your infrastructure.
